title: BEM-1303 receipt intake pipeline
objective:
Create file governance/runtime/external_receipt_intake.py with content import json
from pathlib import Path

RECEIPT_TARGETS = {
    "production_telegram": "governance/proofs/external/telegram/production_receipt.json",
    "live_runtime": "governance/proofs/external/runtime/live_runtime_receipt.json",
    "external_claude": "governance/proofs/external/claude/external_claude_audit_result.json",
}

REQUIRED_FIELDS = {
    "production_telegram": ["receipt_id", "source", "environment", "message_delivery_result", "commit_sha", "secret_scan_pass"],
    "live_runtime": ["receipt_id", "environment", "command_or_entrypoint", "commit_sha", "result", "secret_scan_pass"],
    "external_claude": ["audit_id", "auditor", "reviewed_commit_sha", "verdict", "release_recommendation", "source_ref"],
}

FORBIDDEN_TOKENS = ["bot_token", "api_key", "password", "secret=", "release_pass_true"]


def validate_receipt(kind, receipt):
    errors = []
    if kind not in RECEIPT_TARGETS:
        errors.append(f"unknown receipt kind: {kind}")
        return errors
    for field in REQUIRED_FIELDS[kind]:
        if field not in receipt:
            errors.append(f"missing field {field}")
    if receipt.get("release_pass") is True:
        errors.append("receipt cannot set release_pass=true")
    if kind != "external_claude" and receipt.get("secret_scan_pass") is not True:
        errors.append("secret_scan_pass must be true")
    raw = json.dumps(receipt, ensure_ascii=False).lower()
    for token in FORBIDDEN_TOKENS:
        if token in raw:
            errors.append(f"forbidden token present: {token}")
    if kind == "production_telegram" and receipt.get("environment") != "production_telegram":
        errors.append("telegram receipt environment must be production_telegram")
    if kind == "live_runtime" and receipt.get("environment") != "live_runtime":
        errors.append("runtime receipt environment must be live_runtime")
    if kind == "external_claude" and receipt.get("auditor") != "external_claude":
        errors.append("auditor must be external_claude")
    return errors


def intake(kind, receipt, write=False):
    errors = validate_receipt(kind, receipt)
    target = RECEIPT_TARGETS.get(kind)
    result = {"ok": not errors, "release_pass": False, "kind": kind, "target": target, "errors": errors}
    if result["ok"] and write:
        path = Path(target)
        path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
        path.write_text(json.dumps(receipt, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding="utf-8")
        result["written"] = True
    else:
        result["written"] = False
    return result


def main():
    sample = {"receipt_id": "sample", "source": "telegram", "environment": "production_telegram", "message_delivery_result": "pass", "commit_sha": "sample_sha", "secret_scan_pass": True}
    result = intake("production_telegram", sample, write=False)
    print(json.dumps(result, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))
    return result

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
Create file governance/tests/run_external_receipt_intake_tests.py with content import json
import sys
from pathlib import Path

sys.path.insert(0, str(Path.cwd()))
from governance.runtime.external_receipt_intake import intake

TESTS = [
    ("telegram_valid_dry_run", "production_telegram", {"receipt_id":"tg1","source":"telegram","environment":"production_telegram","message_delivery_result":"pass","commit_sha":"sha","secret_scan_pass":True}, True),
    ("telegram_reject_secret", "production_telegram", {"receipt_id":"tg2","source":"telegram","environment":"production_telegram","message_delivery_result":"pass","commit_sha":"sha","secret_scan_pass":True,"note":"bot_token leaked"}, False),
    ("runtime_valid_dry_run", "live_runtime", {"receipt_id":"rt1","environment":"live_runtime","command_or_entrypoint":"python governance/runtime/minimal_governance_loop_runner.py","commit_sha":"sha","result":"pass","secret_scan_pass":True}, True),
    ("runtime_reject_mock_env", "live_runtime", {"receipt_id":"rt2","environment":"mock","command_or_entrypoint":"fixture","commit_sha":"sha","result":"pass","secret_scan_pass":True}, False),
    ("claude_valid_dry_run", "external_claude", {"audit_id":"cl1","auditor":"external_claude","reviewed_commit_sha":"sha","verdict":"accepted","release_recommendation":"no_pass","source_ref":"external"}, True),
    ("claude_reject_self_claim", "external_claude", {"audit_id":"cl2","auditor":"gpt_self_claim","reviewed_commit_sha":"sha","verdict":"accepted","release_recommendation":"pass","source_ref":"self"}, False),
]

results = []
for name, kind, receipt, expected_ok in TESTS:
    result = intake(kind, receipt, write=False)
    results.append({"test": name, "ok": result.get("ok") is expected_ok, "result": result})
record = {"ok": all(item["ok"] for item in results), "release_pass": False, "results": results}
print(json.dumps(record, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))
raise SystemExit(0 if record["ok"] else 1)
